title: fortcraft
description: this is a simple fortnite mod for your minecraft world that doesnt add too much but enough for you to enjoy!
body:
drop into slightly modifed version of minecraft with fortnite themed items!

- new kevin ore that can be made into powerful tools and armor!
- new sideways portal where you can enter the land of the cubes!
- slurp items
- slap items
- scrap metal

and much much more!
